channel.title: Mathematics on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on James Akl

item.title: A Tour of Robot Mechanics
item.description: INCOMPLETE DRAFT : WORK IN PROGRESS ABSTRACT ~ This article aims to provide a conceptual but rigorous understanding of common robot kinematics and dynamics, presented in a forward and inverse problems setting. After careful reading, the ‘whys’ should become apparent, allowing the ‘hows’ to be better appreciated. Motivation Find reasons to invest before committing. The basic functionality we’d like robots to have, is to move.
